title: MODERNITY by KDT™
description: Modernity by KDT is a performance-first, contemporary resource pack that transforms Minecraft into a realistic cinematic canvas through intentional design, technical artistry, and a commitment to transparent, community-driven creation.
body:
# MODERNITY by KDT | Alpha v1.0.0

**MODERNITY** is a high-fidelity, photo-realistic resource pack that aims to put  performance and playability first. Influenced by fine-art, film, music & motion,  we offer a more sophisticated gaming experience, because we believe _every  player_ deserves access to more contemporary play.

---

![just-getting-started_candid-image-of-creator](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/188270457/561110564-d009dfa7-32d2-4e82-a3f9-893065fcc65f.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzMxNjU1ODIsIm5iZiI6MTc3MzE2NTI4MiwicGF0aCI6Ii8xODgyNzA0NTcvNTYxMTEwNTY0LWQwMDlkZmE3LTMyZDItNGU4Mi1hM2Y5LTg5MzA2NWZjYzY1Zi5wbmc_.orGYan0NzgjFClKS1deQKHBDi1ZhmmRiH81sVO0xaCw)

## 👋🏾 Greetings!
Welcome to the beginning of our journey! 
 
MODERNITY is a half-decade long, passion project that is now on a mission to change the narrative 
regarding realistic packs and poor performance.  We hope that you stick with us as our studio and our
flagship project continue to evolve. 

We hope this project brings you closer to your builds in a way you’ve never experienced before, because 
we believe **Minecraft is more than a game—it’s a canvas.**

**View our full introduction here:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/iXaB2_kBNJY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


---
‎ 

![what's-included_image-of-cracked-deepslate-tiles](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/188270457/561110565-06d8ef10-e1aa-4fb6-a9ff-033bfed948be.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzMxNjYzMDMsIm5iZiI6MTc3MzE2NjAwMywicGF0aCI6Ii8xODgyNzA0NTcvNTYxMTEwNTY1LTA2ZDhlZjEwLWUxYWEtNGZiNi1hOWZmLTAzM2JmZWQ5NDhiZS5wbmc_.kus7CKBZdTSv9oJq_2j1w9C-CjKdQi8KFC9H1qUMb40)

[▶▶ All download variants are available on our official website.](https://www.kaih-doesthings.online/resource-packs)
## 🔎 BLOCK LIST

- Cherry door [ custom model ]
- Concrete & concrete powder : all colors 
- Wool / Carpet : all colors 
- Glass : all colors  [ exception - tinted glass ]
- Ground blocks : grass, dirt, dirt path, podzol, snow, powdered snow, mycelium, mud, gravel, clay
- sand, red sand, farmland [and moist variant]
- Logs : spruce, oak, jungle, dark oak, birch, acacia, crimson stem, warped stem
- Planks:  oak, jungle, dark oak, birch, acacia
- Stones & Slates : stone [ and infected ],  stone bricks [ and infected ], tuff [ and brick variant ],
- deepslates  [ all. Exception - infested ], diorites [ all ], granite [ all ], andesite [ all ], blackstone, gilded
- blackstone, cobblestone
- Terracottas :  light gray, light blue, blue, cyan, green, black
- Metals :  iron , custom  dark & light metals
- Custom paintings
- Custom records courtesy of our good friend, [Khai Tran](https://www.instagram.com/khaitranmusic._/)


  ---
### ❗ KNOWN  ISSUES:
[▶▶ You can view and keep track of our known issues on our website.](https://www.kaih-doesthings.online/known-issues))

‎ 
  ---
### 🎮  TECHNICAL RECOMMENDATIONS

While this pack is built to be able to hold its own without shaders, shaders are highly encouraged to
get the full experience.

#### Shaders:
*   Complementary Unbound
*   SEUS PTGI E12

#### Game Settings:
*   Mipmap Levels: 4
*   Anisotropic Filtering: Enabled


---
‎
